reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module modifies the initramfs to enforce FIPS mode, which is not supported on an already installed RHEL 9 system and can cause boot failures or loss of access. The policy explicitly classifies FIPS-related changes as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; potential boot failure; loss of console/SSH access; system instability; non‑compliance if not properly enabled
